blockers: Backend tenant config support is required before real clinics can manage nav, section visibility, or feature flags.
Feature flags currently default to true for backwards compatibility. Confirm this business rule before onboarding tiered plans.
Dynamic WordPress HTML is sanitized client-side with DOMPurify, but rich embeds may need an allowlist decision later.

tasks.title: Testimonial video + source fields: extend testimonials CPT with video_url, video_thumbnail, source_platform, treatment_received (ACF-only). Inline HTML5 player when video_url present; source/treatment metadata text otherwise.
Commit and review feat/testimonials-collection; wire a dedicated TestimonialsPage if a full-list route is desired.
Update the WordPress tenant config endpoint to return sections, navigation, and features.
Verify GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=...&_embed=true against a real tenant and confirm the resolved base URL/path contract.
Verify the new GET /wp-json/wp/v2/testimonials?_embed=true CPT is registered on the backend and returns title, content, and the rating/location ACF fields.
Decide whether nested WordPress page paths should resolve by final slug only or full path hierarchy.
Replace placeholder production API values in .env.production before deployment.

High-conversion landing sections: FAQ accordion (SEO JSON-LD), Social Proof trust bar (Organization JSON-LD), Insurance & Payment options. All tenant-data-driven, self-hiding, behind feature flags, zero hardcoding.

WCAG 2.1 AA compliance pass: skip link, route focus reset, mobile-menu focus trap + Escape, global :focus-visible ring, fallback alt text for operator-edited images, <address> for contact metadata, ul/li grid structures, sr-only live region announcements. Zero hardcoding.

Dynamic Accessibility Suite: tenant-scoped AccessibilitySuiteContext provider (localStorage-persisted prefs), floating <AccessibilityPanel /> dock with text scale, contrast mode, dyslexic font, text spacing, audio-help live region, virtual pointer target-sizing, and keyboard-map cheat sheet. Visual overlays applied to <html> via CSS classes. Zero hardcoded colors/URLs — all branding via useTenantColors() + CSS variables.

completedLog.summary: Added root .editorconfig and .gitattributes to standardize on UTF-8, LF line endings, and 2-space indentation. Normalized vite.config.ts.
Implemented domain-based tenant resolution, sessionStorage caching, and runtime CSS custom properties mapped to Tailwind variables.
Centralized WordPress REST fetching via React Query hooks. Built visitor-facing pages, SEO layout frames, and skeletal loading states.
Added frontend contract validations for tenant sections, features, and navigation arrays. Hooked catch-all routing inside DynamicPage with client-side DOMPurify scrubbing.
Constructed full 8-layer Testimonials stack matching Doctors/Services. Developed TestimonialsSection centering on dark premium layout canvas featuring an asymmetric 3-card stagger pattern.

updates: Audited existing TenantContext, router, sections, and hooks against all four architecture principles.
Built the full Testimonials 8-layer stack mirroring Doctors/Services exactly.
Designed TestimonialsSection as a dark editorial canvas with an asymmetric 3-card stagger.
Fixed build errors in flight and verified npm run build passes on feat/testimonials-collection.

decisions.decision: R3 resolved via option (a): useFeatureFlag/useSectionVisible accept per-call { defaultValue: false }. Legacy flags keep true-default (backwards-compat). Every new Phase-4 flag MUST pass defaultValue:false so it stays off until a tenant opts in.
decisions.rationale: Closes PRE-1 in phase4-tasks.json; external Ruflo memory_store no longer available so the record lives in-repo.
